name: Bugle Call 'Taps' History & Audio
whatItProvides: Details the origin and historical significance of the 24-note military bugle call played at funerals, wreath-layings, and memorial ceremonies. Provides approved digital audio files.

name: Taps Across America
whatItProvides: A national Memorial Day initiative inviting buglers, trumpeters, and musicians across the nation to perform Taps at 3:00 PM local time to honor the fallen.

name: Military Funeral Honors Coordination
whatItProvides: Step-by-step guides and contacts to request official military funeral honors (including flag folding, presentation, and playing of Taps) from service casualty offices.

name: VA Burial Flag & Memorial Benefits
whatItProvides: Details the process to request official burial flags, government headstones, markers, medallions, and Presidential Memorial Certificates.
